# [Free Workshop] WordPress Security Secrets to a Hack-Proof Site 🔐

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-01-21 17:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 474

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Are you worried about your WordPress site being hacked? Do you
feel overwhelmed by the complexity of website security?

Website security risks are a constant challenge. A single breach
can destroy your hard work, costing you time, money, and your
reputation.

But no worries. Join our FREE live workshop to learn simple steps
to secure your WordPress website like a pro. No technical
expertise or expensive software required!

It's hosted by Ryan Priddey, our Video Content Manager on Feb
17th at 10:30 am EST.

Ryan will be showing you the simple steps I've taken (and still
take) to secure my WordPress websites like a pro. No technical
expertise or expensive software required!

Claim your free spot here: Ultimate WordPress Security Secrets
for a Hack-Proof Website! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.CYsVLmVSxK3DZnZ2mN5aNuFxxrYkElU9ot4l11g0H_Y )

Here's what we'll cover in the workshop:

* Common WP Security Vulnerabilities: Find security loopholes in
your site, from weak passwords to outdated plugins, and learn how
to strengthen your site.
* Easy WordPress Tweaks: You'll learn quick and easy changes you
can make right now to strengthen your site's defenses and prevent
common attacks.
* Essential WordPress Security Plugins: Discover which plugins to
use, and how to configure them for optimal security without
slowing down your site.
* Best Practices for Ongoing Security Maintenance: Get our
checklist of regular tasks to keep your website protected against
new and evolving threats.

Don't let vulnerabilities or hackers take away what you've worked
so hard to build.

Let’s secure your site together!

👉 Register for the FREE WPBeginner Workshop Today! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.CYsVLmVSxK3DZnZ2mN5aNuFxxrYkElU9ot4l11g0H_Y ) (Feb 17th,
10:30 am EST)

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
